activities: and needs. As a Ministry, we understand the challenges that come with transitioning to a new
curriculum. This module reflects our commitment to making this journey as smooth as possible
with the CBC. However, we also encourage educators to supplement this module with their own
research and innovations to address any gaps that may arise during implementation. The suggested
thinking skills in learners while ensuring relevance and adaptability to different school contexts.
